title: lathyrus jepsonii var. californicus
intro: Lathyrus jepsonii var. californicus, commonly known as Jepson's lathyrus or California sweet pea, is a variety of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a vasodilator, which helps to lower blood pressure and improve circulation. The plant is also believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to protect against cell damage and improve overall health. Lathyrus jepsonii var. californicus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and has been used to support cardiovascular health, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote relaxation.
